%%{init: {'theme': 'dark', 'themeVariables': { 'primaryColor': '#2c3e50', 'primaryTextColor': '#ecf0f1', 'primaryBorderColor': '#7f8c8d', 'lineColor': '#ecf0f1', 'secondaryColor': '#34495e', 'tertiaryColor': '#282c34' }}}%% stateDiagram-v2 [*] --> Pending: Create Comment Pending --> Approved: Approve Pending --> Rejected: Reject Pending --> Deleted: Delete Approved --> Deleted: Delete Rejected --> Deleted: Delete Deleted --> [*] state Pending { [*] --> AwaitingModeration AwaitingModeration --> [*] } state Approved { [*] --> Visible Visible --> Edited: Update Edited --> Visible } state Rejected { [*] --> Hidden Hidden --> WithReason: Add Rejection Reason WithReason --> [*] } note right of Pending: Comments start in Pending state
and await moderation note right of Approved: Approved comments are visible
and can be edited note right of Rejected: Rejected comments are hidden
with optional rejection reason note right of Deleted: Deleted comments are
permanently removed

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个评论管理的状态流转图。核心场景是：用户发表评论后先进入待审核，管理员可以批准、拒绝或删除。批准后的评论可见且可编辑，拒绝的则隐藏并可添加拒绝原因。
明白。我梳理一下：起始点是创建评论，然后进入Pending状态。Pending内部需要先AwaitingModeration，对吧？另外，Deleted应该是终态吗？
对，Pending里面包含AwaitingModeration这个子状态。Deleted之后直接结束，没有后续流转。还有，Approved和Rejected也都可以直接删除。
那Approved内部我设计成：初始进入Visible，然后可以Update到Edited，Edited还能回到Visible。这样支持多次编辑。Rejected那边则是Hidden，可以加WithReason来记录拒绝原因。
没错，Approved和Rejected各自用复合状态封装内部流转。对了，每个主状态旁边加注释说明，比如Pending要强调"等待审核"，Approved强调"可见且可编辑"。
好的，我先画出主状态骨架：[*]→Pending→Approved/Rejected/Deleted，以及Approved→Deleted、Rejected→Deleted的删除路径。然后细化Pending、Approved、Rejected三个复合状态的内部结构。
Pending内部的AwaitingModeration需要能回到[*]吗？还是说审核动作都在外层Pending处理？
外层Pending处理Approve/Reject/Delete，内层AwaitingModeration只是占位表示等待中，完成后回到内层终态。这样层次清晰。
完成了。四个注释分别放在Pending、Approved、Rejected、Deleted右侧，主题用dark模式，主色调#2c3e50。整体结构：三层复合状态+Deleted终态，所有删除路径汇聚到[*]。
